<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the current full state first
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current full state:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Let me try clicking blue block 2 to reverse the upper section shift
print("\nTrying blue block 2:")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': 1}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After blue block 2:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
